home.title: Your folders
home.subtitle: Manage and monitor your compressed folders.
home.empty: No folders yet. Compress something from the Scanner.
home.selectPrompt: Select a folder to see its details.
home.watchdogHint: Warns when the launcher adds new uncompressed files.
home.skipLowGainHint: Leave files that would barely shrink uncompressed.

scanner.title: Scanner & compression
scanner.subtitle: Find games and programs to compress.
scanner.empty: No results yet. Select some locations and start a scan.
scanner.skipLowGainHint: Leave files that would barely shrink uncompressed.
scanner.issues: Some files skipped: {{admin}} no permission · {{locked}} in use · {{failed}} errors.
scanner.systemWarn: This is a Windows system folder. Compressing it is not recommended. Add it anyway?

lowGain.message: Almost no savings: these files appear to be already compressed at the source.

telemetry.title: Compression database
telemetry.subtitle: Community-sourced compression-ratio estimates.
telemetry.error: Couldn't load the database. Check your connection or configure the endpoint.
telemetry.hint: Percentages show estimated space saved per algorithm (higher = better).

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Foldit preferences.
settings.defaultAlgorithmHint: Used by default in Scanner and Home.
settings.skipLowGainHint: By default, leave files that would barely shrink uncompressed.
settings.telemetryHint: Send anonymous compression stats to the community database.
settings.contextMenuHint: Adds "Compress with Foldit" to the right-click menu on folders.
